description_long: This is a medium-sized, two-drawer wooden chest of drawers with a rich, dark brown finish. The front features two spacious drawers, each adorned with a single ornate black handle in the center. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain and some minor scuffs visible, indicating moderate use. The legs are short and slightly curved, adding a subtle decorative touch to the otherwise simple design. There are no visible locks, branding, or elaborate embellishments beyond the handles and leg shaping.
description: A dark brown wooden chest of drawers with two drawers, ornate black handles, and slightly curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with ornate black handles and slightly curved legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain wooden panel with visible wood grain and minor scuffs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with some surface marks.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain wooden panel and visible grain.
